question: Which South Region vehicles are statistical outliers by distance, idle time, or trip count this week?
reasoning: Ahmed (Truck 14) leads total distance at 892 km with a balanced 10.4% idle rate. Santos (Van 13) has the most trips (39) at the region's lowest idle rate (8.1%) — the South Region's efficiency benchmark. Hassan (Truck 18) is the critical outlier at 31.6% idle — nearly 3× the region average of 11.8% — driven by extended waits at Milpitas Cold Storage loading bays. Park carries an above-average idle rate at 12.7% despite solid distance numbers. Reducing Hassan's Milpitas dwell by scheduling a dedicated slot could recover ~45 min of productive driving time per day.
